## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and upcoming product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance shows steady incremental growth; impressions stabilized after recent Google update](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Yourco planning launch of new "Frontline Intelligence" AI product for enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Contract renewal coming up Nov 4th; team to schedule discussion with Brody next week](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Some indexing delays noted for new content; team monitoring closely](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Steady small incremental growth month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Impressions drop from Google update has leveled off](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Clicks holding steady at 50-55 per week since update](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [2% growth in top 10 rankings since mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [570% increase in open enrollment subcluster sessions (Sept vs Aug)](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Solid growth across other focus areas: templates, scheduling, internal comms](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Building buffer of content; 3+ articles ready for next week](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Continuing focus on open enrollment, call-offs, templates through October](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Maximizing template usage across multiple relevant articles](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Adding CTAs for template downloads to increase visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Frontline Intelligence Product Launch

  - [New AI-powered analytics product for enterprise customers](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Provides real-time frontline data analysis and insights](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Positioned as business intelligence tool for HR leaders](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Marketing push planned before full product launch](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Team to develop content strategy to support launch](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Website & Content Structure

  - [Discussion on improving enterprise-focused messaging on site](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Plan to consolidate and clarify core use cases (e.g. translations, frontline intelligence)](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Consider reorganizing content into clearer categories as volume grows](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)

### PPC Brand Bidding Issue

  - [Competitors aggressively bidding on Yourco brand terms](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Driving up CPCs (currently \~$2.64 for brand terms)](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)
  - [Jessica adjusting bidding strategy to maintain 100% impression share](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2505.0)
  - [Kyle advised caution on overbidding, suggested manual bidding for more control](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2232.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule contract renewal discussion with Brody for mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Kyle to conduct audit of low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Jessica to share Frontline Intelligence brief for content research](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Continue monitoring indexing performance of new content](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Carrie to begin research on Frontline Intelligence content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Jessica to adjust PPC bidding strategy per Kyle's recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/7yAvHYA48ogvz-FzaGSE8G8cqzS5sbtg?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)
